Package org.eventb.core.ast.extension

Interface IOperatorGroup

All Known Implementing Classes:
ExternalViewUtils.ExternalOpGroup
public interface IOperatorGroup
Common protocol for operator groups.

Instances of this interface are provided by IGrammar.getGroups() and related methods. The purpose is to give a view of an operator group. Objects returned by the various methods are not intended to be modified. Anyway, modifications would have no effect on the described operator group.

Since:
2.0
See Also:
  • IOperator

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<IOperator>
    getAssociativeOperators()
    Returns a set of all associative operators in this group.
    Map<IOperator,Set<IOperator>>
    getCompatibilities()
    Returns a map describing the compatibilities between operators of this group.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the id of this operator group.
    Set<IOperator>
    getOperators()
    Returns a set of all operators in this group.
    Map<IOperator,Set<IOperator>>
    getPriorities()
    Returns a map describing the priorities between operators of this group.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      String getId()
      Returns the id of this operator group.
      Returns:
      a String identifier

    • getOperators

      Set<IOperator> getOperators()
      Returns a set of all operators in this group.
      Returns:
      a set of operators
      See Also:
      • IOperator

    • getPriorities

      Map<IOperator,Set<IOperator>> getPriorities()
      Returns a map describing the priorities between operators of this group.

      The meaning is that the key operator has a lower priority than all operators in the value set.

      Returns:
      a map representation of operator priorities
      See Also:
      • IPriorityMediator.addPriority(String, String)

    • getCompatibilities

      Map<IOperator,Set<IOperator>> getCompatibilities()
      Returns a map describing the compatibilities between operators of this group.

      The meaning is that the key operator is compatible all operators in the value set.

      Returns:
      a map representation of operator compatibilities
      See Also:
      • ICompatibilityMediator.addCompatibility(String, String)

    • getAssociativeOperators

      Set<IOperator> getAssociativeOperators()
      Returns a set of all associative operators in this group.
      Returns:
      a set of operators
      See Also:
      • ICompatibilityMediator.addAssociativity(String)
